settings.html:
<style>

*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; background: #fff; color: #0d1117; }

/* ── NAVBAR ── */
.navbar { background: #0d1117; position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 100; }
.navbar-top {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto 1fr;
  align-items: center; padding: 14px 48px 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.navbar-socials { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; justify-content: flex-end; }
.navbar-socials a { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); text-decoration: none; transition: color .2s; display:flex; }
.navbar-socials a:hover { color:#fff; }
.navbar-logo { display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; gap:2px; text-decoration:none; justify-self:center; }
.logo-main { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; }
.logo-wordmark { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:18px; letter-spacing:.06em; color:#fff; text-transform:uppercase; }
.logo-wordmark .grp { font-weight:400; font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.5); margin-left:5px; letter-spacing:.14em; }
.logo-sub { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:300; font-size:7px; letter-spacing:.36em; color:rgba(255,255,255,.22); text-transform:uppercase; }
.navbar-bottom { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:40px; padding:10px 48px; position:relative; }
.nav-link { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.13em; text-transform:uppercase; color:rgba(255,255,255,.45); text-decoration:none; transition:color .2s; position:relative; padding-bottom:2px; }
.nav-link::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:-2px; left:0; right:0; height:1px; background:#1a3875; transform:scaleX(0); transform-origin:left; transition:transform .25s; }
.nav-link:hover { color:#fff; }
.nav-link:hover::after, .nav-link.active::after { transform:scaleX(1); }
.nav-link.active { color:#fff; }
.nav-cta { position:absolute; right:48px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:9.5px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.13em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; background:#1a3875; padding:8px 18px; border-radius:3px; transition:background .2s; white-space:nowrap; }
.nav-cta:hover { background:#0f2456; }
.nav-lang { position:absolute; left:48px; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%); display:flex; gap:6px; align-items:center; }
.lang-btn { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:9px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.1em; color:rgba(255,255,255,.25); background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; text-transform:uppercase; transition:color .2s; padding:0; }
.lang-btn:hover, .lang-btn.active { color:rgba(255,255,255,.7); }
.lang-sep { color:rgba(255,255,255,.12); font-size:10px; }

/* ── BREADCRUMB ── */
.breadcrumb { padding:14px 80px; background:#f5f7fa; border-bottom:1px solid #e8ecf2; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; }
.breadcrumb a { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#1a3875; text-decoration:none; }
.breadcrumb-sep { font-size:10px; color:#bbb; }
.breadcrumb span { font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.1em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#888; }

/* ── HERO ── */
.hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 88vh;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
}

/* La imagen de maquinaria como fondo */
.hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background-image: url('data:image/jpeg;base64,');
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center center;
}

/* Overlay triple: oscuro total izquierda, semitransparente derecha */
.hero-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: rgba(5,8,18,0.45);
}

/* Tinte azul sobre la imagen para conectar con brand */
.hero-tint {
  position: absolute; inset: 0;
  background: radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 75% 50%, rgba(26,56,117,0.18) 0%, transparent 70%);
}

.hero-inner {
  position: relative; z-index: 2;
  padding: 100px 80px;
  max-width: 680px;
}

.hero-tag {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
  font-family: 'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: .2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #e8420a;
  margin-bottom: 28px;
}
.hero-tag::before { content:''; display:block; width:28px; height:2px; background:#e8420a; }

.hero h1 {
  font-family: 'Montserrat',sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(38px,5.5vw,64px);
  font-weight: 900; letter-spacing:-2px; line-height:1.0;
  color: #fff; margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.hero h1 span { color: #1a6dc7; }

.hero-sub {
  font-size: 17px; font-weight: 300;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,.55); line-height: 1.8;
  max-width: 520px; margin-bottom: 44px;
}
.hero-sub strong { color:rgba(255,255,255,.85); font-weight:600; }

.hero-stats {
  display: flex; gap: 0;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius:8px; overflow:hidden;
  width: fit-content; margin-bottom: 40px;
}
.hero-stat {
  padding: 18px 28px; border-right: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08); text-align:center;
}
.hero-stat:last-child { border-right:none; }
.hero-stat-num {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:26px; font-weight:900;
  color:#fff; letter-spacing:-0.5px; line-height:1;
}
.hero-stat-num span { color:#e8420a; }
.hero-stat-label { font-size:10px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.35); margin-top:5px; letter-spacing:.04em; }

.hero-cta {
  display: inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
  background:#1a3875; color:#fff; padding:15px 30px; border-radius:3px;
  text-decoration:none; transition:background .2s;
  border: 2px solid #1a3875;
}
.hero-cta:hover { background:transparent; color:#fff; }

/* ── INTRO ── */
.intro {
  padding: 80px 80px 72px;
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 72px; align-items: start;
  background: #fff;
}
.intro-label {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#1a3875;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:18px;
}
.intro-label::before { content:''; display:block; width:20px; height:2px; background:#1a3875; }
.intro-title {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(26px,3vw,38px); font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1.1; color:#0d1117; margin-bottom:22px;
}
.intro-title span { color:#1a3875; }
.intro-text {
  font-size:17px; font-weight:300; line-height:1.9; color:#444; margin-bottom:32px;
}
.intro-text strong { font-weight:600; color:#0d1117; }
.intro-cta {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10.5px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#fff; background:#1a3875; padding:14px 26px; border-radius:3px;
  text-decoration:none; transition:background .2s;
}
.intro-cta:hover { background:#0f2456; }

/* What items grid */
.what-grid {
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:10px;
}
.what-item {
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  padding:13px 14px; background:#f4f7fb; border-radius:7px;
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
  color:#1a3875; border:1px solid rgba(26,56,117,.08);
  transition:all .2s; cursor:default;
}
.what-item:hover {
  background:#1a3875; color:#fff;
  transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(26,56,117,.18);
}
.what-icon { font-size:18px; flex-shrink:0; }

/* ── CAMPAS ── */
.campas-section { background:#0d1117; padding:72px 80px; }
.section-tag {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:10px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.2em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#e8420a;
  display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; margin-bottom:14px;
}
.section-tag::before { content:''; display:block; width:20px; height:2px; background:#e8420a; }
.section-title {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(26px,3.2vw,40px); font-weight:900;
  letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1.1; color:#fff; margin-bottom:44px;
}

.campas-grid {
  display:flex;
  gap:4px;
  border-radius:12px; overflow:hidden;
  height: 480px;
}
.campa {
  position:relative; overflow:hidden; cursor:pointer;
  flex: 1;
  transition: flex .55s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
.campas-grid:hover .campa { flex: 0.6; }
.campas-grid:hover .campa:hover { flex: 2.2; }
.campa img {
  width:100%; height:100%; object-fit:cover; display:block;
  transition:transform .55s cubic-bezier(.25,.46,.45,.94);
}
.campa:hover img { transform:scale(1.04); }
.campa-ov {
  position:absolute; inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(to top, rgba(5,10,20,.88) 0%, rgba(5,10,20,.2) 55%, transparent 100%);
}
.campa-info {
  position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0;
  padding:20px 22px; z-index:2;
}
.campa-size {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:900; font-size:22px;
  color:#fff; letter-spacing:-0.5px; line-height:1; margin-bottom:3px;
}
.campa-size em { color:#e8420a; font-style:normal; font-size:12px; }
.campa-name {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:14px;
  color:#fff; margin-bottom:4px;
}
.campa-desc { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.5); letter-spacing:.04em; }

/* ── FEATURES ── */
.features { padding:72px 80px; background:#f4f7fb; }
.features-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr); gap:20px; margin-top:44px; }
.feat {
  background:#fff; border-radius:10px; padding:30px 26px;
  border:1px solid rgba(26,56,117,.08); transition:all .25s;
}
.feat:hover {
  transform:translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(26,56,117,.1);
  border-color:rgba(26,56,117,.2);
}
.feat-icon { font-size:30px; margin-bottom:14px; display:block; }
.feat-title {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:15px; font-weight:800;
  letter-spacing:-.2px; color:#0d1117; margin-bottom:8px;
}
.feat-desc { font-size:13.5px; line-height:1.7; color:#666; }

/* ── CTA ── */
.cta {
  background:#1a3875; padding:64px 80px;
  display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr auto; gap:48px; align-items:center;
}
.cta-title {
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:clamp(24px,3vw,38px);
  font-weight:900; letter-spacing:-1px; line-height:1.05; color:#fff; margin-bottom:10px;
}
.cta-sub { font-size:15px; font-weight:300; color:rgba(255,255,255,.6); line-height:1.65; }
.cta-btn {
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;
  font-family:'Montserrat',sans-serif; font-size:11px; font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase;
  background:#fff; color:#1a3875; padding:18px 30px; border-radius:3px;
  text-decoration:none; white-space:nowrap; transition:all .2s;
}
.cta-btn:hover { background:#0d1117; color:#fff; }

/* ── FOOTER ── */
.footer { background:#060a10; padding:24px 80px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; }
.footer p { font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,.2); letter-spacing:.03em; }

/* ── ANIM ── */
@keyframes fadeUp { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(22px); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0); } }
.au { animation:fadeUp .7s cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1) both; }
.d1 { animation-delay:.1s; } .d2 { animation-delay:.2s; } .d3 { animation-delay:.3s; } .d4 { animation-delay:.4s; }

</style>



<!-- NAVBAR -->
<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="navbar-top">
    <div></div>
    <a class="navbar-logo" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">
      <div class="logo-main">
        <svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 120 120" fill="none">
          <rect width="120" height="120" rx="22" fill="#1a3875"/>
          <path d="M60 18 L88 33 L88 65 L60 50 Z" fill="white" opacity=".95"/>
          <path d="M32 33 L60 18 L60 50 L32 65 Z" fill="white" opacity=".75"/>
          <path d="M32 65 L60 50 L88 65 L60 80 Z" fill="white" opacity=".5"/>
          <circle cx="84" cy="52" r="16" fill="#e8420a"/>
          <circle cx="84" cy="48.5" r="6.5" fill="white"/>
          <path d="M84 55 Q78 68 84 72 Q90 68 84 55Z" fill="#e8420a"/>
        </svg>
        <div class="logo-wordmark">LOGISPARK<span class="grp">GROUP</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="logo-sub">Smart logistics solutions</div>
    </a>
    <div class="navbar-socials">
      <a href="#"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M16 8a6 6 0 0 1 6 6v7h-4v-7a2 2 0 0 0-4 0v7H10v-7a6 6 0 0 1 6-6zM2 9h4v12H2z"/><circle cx="4" cy="4" r="2"/></svg></a>
      <a href="#"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1 1 12.63 8 4 4 0 0 1 16 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="navbar-bottom">
    <div class="nav-lang">
      <button class="lang-btn active">ES</button>
      <span class="lang-sep">|</span>
      <button class="lang-btn">EN</button>
    </div>
    <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">Inicio</a>
  <a class="nav-link active" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/almacenamiento-exterior/">Almacenamiento Exterior</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/nave-industrial/">Nave Industrial</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/parques-trasteros/">Parques de Trasteros</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/logikey/">LogiKey™</a>
  <a class="nav-link" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/contacto/">Contacto</a>
    <a class="nav-cta" href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/contacto/">Solicitar espacio →</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- BREADCRUMB -->
<div class="breadcrumb">
  <a href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/">Inicio</a>
  <span class="breadcrumb-sep">›</span>
  <a href="https://logispark.pl.l0l.ovh/nave-industrial/">Nave Industrial</a>
  <span class="breadcrumb-sep">›</span>
  <span>Almacenamiento al Exterior</span>
</div>

<!-- HERO con imagen de maquinaria de fondo -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-tint"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-tag au">01 · Almacenamiento Exterior</div>
    <h1 class="au d1">Espacio exterior<br><span>cuando más</span><br>lo necesitas</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub au d2">
      Soluciones de almacenaje al aire libre para <strong>mercancía voluminosa, maquinaria pesada y vehículos</strong>. Instalaciones propias, vigiladas 24/7 y disponibles de inmediato.
    </p>
    <div class="hero-stats au d3">
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">65.000<span>m²</span></div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label">Total campa propia</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">3</div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label">Instalaciones activas</div>
      </div>
      <div class="hero-stat">
        <div class="hero-stat-num">24<span>h</span></div>
        <div class="hero-stat-label">Vigilancia continua</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <a href="#contacto" class="hero-cta au d4">Solicitar espacio →</a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- INTRO -->
<section class="intro">
  <div>
    <div class="intro-label">Nuestra propuesta</div>
    <h2 class="intro-title">El almacenaje exterior<br><span>que nadie más</span><br>puede ofrecerte</h2>
    <p class="intro-text">
      Si necesitas espacio para almacenar <strong>vehículos pesados, maquinaria, matrices, bigbags, materias primas, contenedores</strong> o cualquier otro elemento voluminoso, nosotros tenemos la solución.<br><br>
      En nuestras instalaciones propias podemos ofrecerte ese servicio de almacenaje tan complicado de encontrar. Trabajamos con empresas de construcción, importadores, operadores logísticos y fabricantes que necesitan espacio externo con garantías reales.
    </p>
    <a href="#contacto" class="intro-cta">Solicitar espacio →</a>
  </div>
  <div>
    <div class="what-grid">
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🚛</span>Vehículos pesados</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">⚙️</span>Maquinaria industrial</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🔩</span>Matrices y moldes</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🛍️</span>Bigbags</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🪨</span>Materias primas</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">📦</span>Contenedores</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🏗️</span>Material de obra</div>
      <div class="what-item"><span class="what-icon">🚢</span>Mercancía en tránsito</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CAMPAS -->
<section class="campas-section">
  <div class="section-tag">Nuestras instalaciones</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">3 campas propias en el Vallès</h2>
  <div class="campas-grid">
    <div class="campa">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Les Franqueses del Vallès"/>
      <div class="campa-ov"></div>
      <div class="campa-info">
        <div class="campa-size">20.000 <em>m²</em></div>
        <div class="campa-name">Les Franqueses del Vallès</div>
        <div class="campa-desc">Vallada · Videovigilancia 24h · CRA</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="campa">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mollet del Vallès"/>
      <div class="campa-ov"></div>
      <div class="campa-info">
        <div class="campa-size">20.000 <em>m²</em></div>
        <div class="campa-name">Mollet del Vallès</div>
        <div class="campa-desc">Acceso directo autopista · Gran capacidad</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="campa">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Parets del Vallès"/>
      <div class="campa-ov"></div>
      <div class="campa-info">
        <div class="campa-size">15.000 <em>m²</em></div>
        <div class="campa-name">Parets del Vallès</div>
        <div class="campa-desc">Polígono industrial consolidado</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FEATURES -->
<section class="features">
  <div class="section-tag" style="color:#1a3875;"><span style="background:#1a3875;display:block;width:20px;height:2px;"></span>Por qué elegirnos</div>
  <h2 class="section-title" style="color:#0d1117;">Lo que nos diferencia</h2>
  <div class="features-grid">
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">🔒</span><div class="feat-title">Seguridad total</div><p class="feat-desc">Campas perimetradas, valladas y con videovigilancia conectada a central receptora de alarmas (CRA) 24h.</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">📋</span><div class="feat-title">Seguro incluido</div><p class="feat-desc">Seguro de responsabilidad civil y de mercancías acorde a lo depositado en nuestras instalaciones.</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">📐</span><div class="feat-title">Flexibilidad total</div><p class="feat-desc">Desde una plaza de parking hasta miles de metros cuadrados. Sin mínimos ni contratos rígidos.</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">📍</span><div class="feat-title">Ubicación estratégica</div><p class="feat-desc">Las 3 campas en el Vallès Oriental, con acceso directo a AP-7, C-17 y C-33. A 30 min de Barcelona.</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">⚡</span><div class="feat-title">Respuesta inmediata</div><p class="feat-desc">Te contactamos en menos de 24 horas con disponibilidad real y precio cerrado. Sin burocracia.</p></div>
    <div class="feat"><span class="feat-icon">🤝</span><div class="feat-title">Trato directo</div><p class="feat-desc">Hablas directamente con los propietarios. Soluciones ad-hoc para cada cliente, sin intermediarios.</p></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA -->
<section class="cta" id="contacto">
  <div>
    <h2 class="cta-title">¿Necesitas espacio<br>exterior ahora?</h2>
    <p class="cta-sub">Cuéntanos qué necesitas y te respondemos en menos de 24 horas con disponibilidad real y precio concreto.</p>
  </div>
  <a href="mailto:info@logispark.es" class="cta-btn">Contactar ahora →</a>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<div class="footer">
  <p>© 2025 Logispark Group · Les Franqueses del Vallès · Barcelona</p>
  <p>info@logispark.es · +34 629 22 00 66</p>
</div>
